# Kidz Korner

## About
Kidz Korner is a family-owned and operated day care center and indoor playground located in Milton, Ontario. Established over 30 years ago, the center provides Montessori-quality child care and specialized support for children with special needs.

## Services
- [https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/childcare](https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/childcare): Full-time and Part-time infant, toddler, and preschool programs.
- [https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/parties](https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/parties): Private venue rentals and custom party packages.
- [https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/playground](https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/playground): Indoor play structure for private rental or drop in play.
- [https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/camp](https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/camp): Seasonal outdoor and indoor activity programs for kids.
- [https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/workshop](https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/workshop): Early childhood development and sensory play sessions including many Mommy & Me style workshops.

## Locations
- Main Center: 150 Nipissing Rd Units #10 & 11, Milton, ON L9T 5B3
- Proximity: ~2km (4-minute drive) from the Milton GO Station. Conveniently located for parents dropping off before heading to the station parking or the 401.

## Contact
- Phone: (905) 878-4697
- Website: https://www.kidzkornermilton.com/
- Hours: Monday - Friday: 9:00am - 6:00pm, Weekends: Open for private parties only (by appointment)

## Service Area
Milton, Halton Hills, Meadowvale, Hornby

## Key Facts
- 30+ years in business
- 50+ five-star customer reviews
- Muslim-owned and operated
- Specialized in special needs child care
- Montessori-quality curriculum

## What Makes Us Different
Kidz Korner provides a personalized alternative to standard Montessori care for middle to upper-class families. The facility features an in-house cook who prepares a rotating seasonal menu. We integrate educational workshops directly into our programs and offer a family-operated environment that prioritizes individual attention over corporate structures.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is the pricing for full-time child care?**
Pricing varies based on the age of the child and specific program requirements. Contact us at (905) 878-4697 for a personalized quote and current availability.

**Do you provide meals for the children?**
Yes. We have an in-house cook who prepares fresh meals following a rotating seasonal menu to ensure nutritional variety.

**Can you accommodate children with special needs?**
Yes. We specialize in special needs child care and work closely with families to provide an inclusive and supportive environment.

**Are your weekend parties private?**
Yes. On Saturdays and Sundays, the facility is reserved exclusively for private parties by appointment only.

**What ages do you accept for your camps and school programs?**
We provide care for toddlers through school-aged children, including specialized before/after school programs and camps for PA days and summer breaks.

**How do you handle transitions for new children starting daycare?**
We offer a structured "Orientation Week" where children can attend for shorter periods to get acclimated to the teachers and environment. We work closely with parents during this time to ensure the transition is as smooth and anxiety-free as possible for both the child and the family.
